data.name: InvalidActivationCodeFormat
data.value: Invalid activation code format. Expected VIORA-<SP|LW|WS><NN>-<XXXX>.

data.name: ActivationCodeNotRecognized
data.value: Activation code is not recognized by the issued-code catalog.

data.name: ActivationCodeAlreadyClaimed
data.value: Activation code has already been claimed by another device.

data.name: NoTriggeringRisk
data.value: No triggering risk was observed for the plot; a dynamic nutrition plan cannot be generated.
